name: Prisma Cloud
description: Cloud-native security platform. Monitor cloud workloads, compliance, and vulnerabilities.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Prisma Cloud
2. Go to Settings → Access Keys
3. Add Access Key, copy ID and Secret
4. Note your API URL
5. Paste all values below

credentialFields.label: Prisma Cloud API URL
credentialFields.helpText: Your Prisma Cloud API URL (e.g. https://api.prismacloud.io).

checks.name: Prisma Cloud App Availability
checks.description: Verifies Prisma Cloud API is accessible.
